nasb.text: So Joshua went up from Gilgal, he and all the people of war with him and all the valiant warriors.

esv.text: So Joshua went up from Gilgal, he and all the people of war with him, and all the mighty men of valor.

cnv.text: 於是約書亞和所有能作戰的人，以及所有英勇的戰士，都一起從吉甲上去。

ccb.text: 于是，约书亚便率领他的全军，包括所有的精兵，从吉甲上去。
